name: Romance Dawn
description: The first set of the One Piece Card Game, featuring the Straw Hat Crew and earlygame classics.

name: Paramount War
description: Marineford arc themed set featuring Black Beard, Whitebeard, and more.

name: Pillars of Strength
description: Beast Pirates and Big Mom lead the charge in this power-focused set.

name: Straw Hat Crew
description: Starter deck leader focusing on Red Straw Hat characters and Don!! generation.

name: Worst Generation
description: Starter deck featuring the Worst Generation and abolishing mechanics.
